div1.entryFree: Sequence, succession: cut off the s. of posterity, John II, 96. how art thou a king but by fair s. and succession? R2 II, 1, 199. why lifts she up her arms in s. thus? Tit. IV, 1, 37 (== one after the other, alternately; cf. sequent in Oth. I, 2, 41). tell Athens, in the s. of degree from high to low throughout, Tim. V, 1, 211.
